transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National Bank. My name is James. Can I take your full name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh hi, yeah. So it's, um — Bradley, Bradley Osei. And, um, date of birth is — uh — the, uh, twenty — twenty-second of, uh — November. Nineteen, uh, ninety-two.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Osei, you're verified. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So, um, my card — like my debit card — it's been, like, refused? Like twice this morning. Um, once at a like, coffee shop and then I tried to pay for, uh, like groceries online and it, um — [inaudible] — it just kept saying like, card declined.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can see both declined transactions. Let me check what triggered the refusals. The coffee shop decline appears to be a contactless limit reset issue — your contactless limit was reached after a sequence of smaller payments. The online decline is separate — your card needs 3D Secure verification for online purchases above fifty pounds, and the code was going to an outdated email.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh — uh, right. So like, there's like two different — uh — two different problems?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Two different causes, yes. I've reset your contactless limit — you can use contactless again right now. For the email — what's your current email address so I can update it?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah, it's, um — uh, b.osei — that's B-dot-O-S-E-I — at, um, gmail.com.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Updated. Your next online purchase over fifty pounds will send the code to that address. Both issues are now resolved.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Brilliant, yeah. Um, that's — that's great. Um, [inaudible] — both sorted then?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Both sorted. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, that's — uh — yeah, that's everything. Cheers.
